basics.name: Johan Meneses
basics.label: Senior Frontend Developer
basics.summary:
Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building modern web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I specialize in creating scalable, user-focused products and have worked across product development, CMS-driven platforms (Prismic), and end-to-end HTML email campaigns for global audiences of 100K+ subscribers.

I'm actively transitioning to fullstack development, learning Node.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, and AI integration with LangChain and Anthropic API. My focus is on building intelligent, production-ready applications that combine strong frontend experiences with robust backend architecture.

Currently based in Colombia, fully remote. I'm open to opportunities with forward-thinking US and EU-based companies that value both technical excellence and continuous learning.

work.name: Takeoff Media
work.summary:
→ Develop and maintain modern web applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript, integrating Prismic headless CMS to deliver dynamic, content-driven experiences across multiple markets.

→ Design and execute responsive HTML email campaigns using Stripo, Email on Acid, Braze, and Salesforce Marketing Cloud for 100,000+ subscribers, ensuring cross-client compatibility and rendering consistency.

→ Contribute to Vue.js projects across the team's mixed frontend stack, ensuring performance optimization and long-term code maintainability.

📦 Next.js · React · TypeScript · Prismic · HTML Email Development · Stripo · Email on Acid · Braze · Salesforce Marketing Cloud · Vue.js · REST API

work.name: Siesa
work.summary:
→ Built a company intranet serving 200+ employees with custom WordPress plugins and themes, enabling users to publish posts, view marketing announcements, create peer-to-peer announcements, and authenticate via company Active Directory — improving internal communication and reducing reliance on email.

→ Developed a customer support portal with custom WordPress plugins and themes that allowed clients to create and manage support tickets, communicate with support teams in real-time, access product documentation, and join live webinars — reducing support phone line volume by an estimated 40% and enabling the support team to handle more complex issues.

→ Designed MySQL database schemas to support multi-user workflows, real-time communication, and reporting across both platforms.

→ Integrated REST APIs to connect WordPress with internal systems (Active Directory, ticketing backend) and external services, enabling seamless data flow across the organization.

📦 PHP · WordPress · MySQL · REST API · JavaScript · HTML · CSS · Active Directory Integration · Custom Themes & Plugins

work.name: GB Media Group
work.summary:
→ Developed fully responsive, cross-browser websites using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for multiple clients, translating complex designs into clean, maintainable code.

→ Designed and validated high-fidelity prototypes and wireframes in Adobe Illustrator with clients before development, ensuring alignment on requirements.

→ Built the first web presence for 5+ clients with optimized contact forms that drove qualified leads directly to their businesses; implemented SEO fundamentals (on-page optimization, site structure, performance) to improve organic discoverability.

→ Managed complete deployment lifecycle for all projects, including domain configuration, SSL certificates, email setup, and ongoing site administration.

→ Built custom PHP features for backend functionality and dynamic content integration.

📦 React · JavaScript · HTML · CSS · PHP · Adobe Illustrator · SEO Fundamentals · Responsive Design · Cross-browser Compatibility

projects.name: Clinic Dentist
projects.description: Private client project: a full-stack platform for dental clinics covering patient records, appointment scheduling, and treatment billing. Includes an interactive digital odontogram for clinical tracking and role-based access for admins, dentists, and receptionists.

projects.name: Studio Models
projects.description: Marketing website for a model agency focused on talent scouting and fashion production. Built with Astro for fast performance and integrated Resend to streamline contact and inquiry workflows.

projects.name: GB Media Group
projects.description: Corporate website for a digital services agency, built with React and Prismic. Designed to give non-technical teams a flexible editing experience while keeping the UI clean, responsive, and easy to maintain.

projects.name: Edpracol Website
projects.description: High-performance landing page for a beauty and personal care distributor. Combines GSAP animations, Prismic CMS, and performance-focused implementation to deliver a polished experience with strong Core Web Vitals.
